hero_subtitle: SFTY supports procurement teams by providing audit-ready oversight, role-based access, and governance controls for trusted vendor deployment in regulated digital asset environments.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Procurement teams face challenges assessing vendor compliance controls, security governance and operational risks in fragmented digital asset environments. This creates gaps in audit trails, access governance and deployment assurances essential for enterprise trust and bank due diligence.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects role-based access, audit logs, evidence integrity and deployment controls into a unified compliance layer so procurement teams can assess vendor risk and demonstrate enterprise readiness clearly.
workflow_title: From vendor risk inputs to review decisions
workflow_description: SFTY structures vendor risk data through review workflows, case management, evidence logging and final decisions to support enterprise procurement oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond vendor risk. Clear decision evidence
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides a provider-neutral layer that connects vendor outputs into structured workflows, evidence, decisions and audit-ready records for enterprise procurement review.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY gives VASPs a controlled compliance layer that strengthens vendor oversight through audit-ready evidence, bank due diligence support and secure enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support enterprise vendor risk review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how audit logs support vendor oversight transparency
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how role-based access controls support secure governance
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Compare private deployment options for institutional compliance readiness
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance procurement?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a secure compliance control layer supporting role-based access, audit logs and governance to help procurement teams assess vendor risk and deployment readiness in regulated digital asset environments.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support vendor risk review?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures vendor outputs into controlled workflows, preserving evidence and decision logs to enable clear risk assessments and oversight throughout onboarding and operational processes.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY records detailed decision logs, case histories and evidence packages, supporting audit readiness and supporting traceability for compliance and regulatory inspections.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY connect to existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, connecting their outputs into a single operational workflow without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace compliance providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above compliance providers, aggregating and structuring their data into workflows, cases and reports rather than replacing underlying tools or service providers.
final_title: Review vendor risk and deployment readiness
final_description: Explore how SFTY supports audit logs, role-based access and governance controls for secure vendor oversight in regulated environments.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
